p:cNvPr.name: Picture 6
p:cNvPr.descr: Ringmaster® Technologies, Inc Announces Its SOC 2 Type 1 Achievement

a:r.a:t: Did you know a single exclusion in a pharmacy contract can have a 10% impact on costs?
Pharmacy contracts are complex. The computations are difficult and require merging myriad data sources from Medi-Span, NCPDP, CMS, Drug Lists and Client Claims data to properly calculate.
brings these data sources together efficiently, securely, and accurately
platform is a technology product designed to
facilitate greater data accuracy, ensure contract competitiveness, and maximize cost abatement.
companies that consistently market their pharmacy contracts every year spend, on average, 8% less on prescriptions than those that don’t? .
allows us to conduct market checks to be done year over year and ensures contracts are always market competitive.
that PBM’s very often miss on their contract guarantees by 3-5%?
analytics platform tracks contract performance and ensures contract terms are met.

All data is housed in the AWS Cloud so you can rest assured your data is stored securely. Ringmaster is trusted by the industry and is used by thousands of, private commercial clients, and public entities like school districts and municipalities.
Partners & Ringmaster Technologies clients include some of the nation’s leading health plans and organizations of all sizes.
